texto: Patience is a virtue Savannah, to tolerate delay. It implies self control and forbearance, as opposed to wanting what we want when we want it. Something to think about. . .Catherine Weaver (Character), "Terminator: The Sarah Connor Chronicles
explicacao: Citação de Catherine Weaver sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Patience is a virtue Savannah, to tolerate delay. It implies self control and forbearance, as opp…” articula reflexao, fiction, patience em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como patience.
